title: EQ - Custom EQ, save a custom EQ, change some values, Reset EQ
scenario: Custom EQ values do not reset to default slider positions after using Reset EQ in Device Settings
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a connected device that supports Equalizer (EQ).
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
3. Select 'Custom EQ' from the available EQ presets.
4. Adjust some frequency band sliders to new values and tap 'Save' to save the custom EQ preset.
5. Change some frequency band sliders to different values (without saving).
7. Observe the EQ screen and the positions of the frequency band sliders.
expected: All frequency band sliders return to their default (center/middle) positions, and the previously saved custom EQ preset values are cleared/removed.
